g.text: - When a consumer is created, it is configured with a group

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - On the first poll(), it joins a consumer group in Kafka.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Kafka assigns topic partitions to the consumer, and the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: consumer begins reading from the committed offsets for that

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Then, the consumer calls poll() to retrieve records,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: processes them in the application, and commits offsets

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Kafka does not track the actual processing logic or whether

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: processing succeeded; it only tracks committed offsets.

g.text: At-most-once: commit the offset before processing

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: → if the consumer crashes after commit, the message may be lost

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: At-least-once: process the message before committing the offset

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: → if the consumer crashes before commit, the message may be consumed again

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Exactly-once: the processing result and offset commit are handled atomically

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: → no message loss and no duplicate effect

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ISR = ISR is a metadata record that

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: tracks which replicas of a partition are currently in sync with the leader.
